name: BB:DeviceDefinition: DNS
notes: This Building Block defines DNS devices on the system.
bb_references: BB:DeviceDefinition: DNS on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of ISC BIND, Microsoft Windows Security Event Log, Infoblox NIOS, BlueCat Networks Adonis, Microsoft DNS Debug, Amazon AWS Application Load Balancer Access Logs, Amazon GuardDuty
TD_list: APPLY BB:DeviceDefinition: DNS on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of ISC BIND, Microsoft Windows Security Event Log, Infoblox NIOS, BlueCat Networks Adonis, Microsoft DNS Debug, Amazon AWS Application Load Balancer Access Logs, Amazon GuardDuty
